description: An agent needs to create a compelling and accurate MLS listing for a new property.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve property details, including square footage, number of beds/baths, and tax records.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary factual data for the listing.

nodes.task_description: Write compelling marketing copy for the public remarks section, highlighting key features.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates engaging and descriptive text for the listing.

nodes.task_description: Upload professional photos and schedule the listing to go live on the MLS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads media and publishes the listing.
